1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/blob/master/io-package.json).

6019.issue: [W6019] [README.md](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/blob/master/README.md) contains 102 changelog entries. Consider adding CHANGELOG_OLD.md file supported by @alcalzone/releasescript.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#780] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/issues/780)

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-admin/package.json), but no npm dependabot entry matches affected directories. Add matching "directory" or "directories" entries.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-license 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
